title: wolfhsm transport.rs: safe transport config types
description: Create wolfhsm/src/transport.rs. Expose Rust-friendly transport config types: TcpTransport { ip: String, port: u16 }, UdsTransport { path: String }, ShmTransport { name: String, req_size: u16, resp_size: u16 }. Each holds owned Rust data and provides a method that builds the C config struct (lifetime tied to self). The C structs (posixTransportTcpConfig, etc.) are in wolfhsm-sys bindings. Use unsafe internally to build C structs; public API is safe. In lib.rs: pub mod transport;
